_comment: agent-session-control-stack Phase 1 example env for running session-health + compact-plus together. Merge the env block into your ~/.claude/settings.json after installing the upstream tools yourself. This file does not install hooks or start proxies. Values shown for SESSION_HEALTH_* are the upstream defaults for the main threshold knobs; omit them to track upstream. Two further knobs exist upstream (SESSION_HEALTH_CACHE_DELTA, SESSION_HEALTH_CUMULATIVE) - leave them unset unless you know why you need them.
_comment_compact_plus: In the env block below, empty COMPACT_PLUS_* backends = skip LLM state-file generation (the default 'claude -p' is a paid API call on every compact). Transcript backup and recovery injection still work. Opt in explicitly if you want automated state files.
_comment_pxpipe: pxpipe is enabled per-launch, not via settings.json. Start the reviewed proxy with 'npx -y pxpipe-proxy@0.8.0', then launch Claude Code with 'ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:47821 claude'. Read docs/claude-code/pxpipe-safety.md BEFORE enabling. Do NOT put ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL in settings env unless the proxy runs permanently.
_comment_reminder: Do not install a statusline that writes the compact-plus warn marker. Without the marker producer, the 60% compact reminder never fires and session-health remains the single compact decider. No other configuration is needed.
